user.title: JUNG HOME Integration Setup
user.description: Enter the IP address of your JUNG HOME gateway. Ensure the gateway IP address stays the same, for example by creating a DHCP reservation in your router.

data_description.ip: IP address of your JUNG HOME hub/gateway

token.title: JUNG HOME Authentication
token.description: Enter the IP address and authentication token for your JUNG HOME gateway.

data_description.ip: IP address of your JUNG HOME hub/gateway
data_description.token: API authentication token for accessing the JUNG HOME system

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the JUNG HOME gateway
error.register_failed: Automatic token request failed. Enter the token manually.

progress.press_gateway_button: Press the button on your JUNG HOME gateway within 3 minutes to allow Home Assistant access.
